invariants.name: I1_CONNECT_ONLY_IDLE
invariants.spec: §2: A TLS connection is initiated only when the OP has no existing connection.

invariants.name: I2_TLS_AFTER_CONNECT
invariants.spec: §2: TLS handshake events occur only on an active in-progress connection.

invariants.name: I3_CREATE_AFTER_TLS
invariants.spec: §5.1: CREATE cells are sent after TLS handshake completes (TLS_HANDSHAKE).

invariants.name: I4_CREATED_ECHOES_CREATE
invariants.spec: §5.1: A CREATED cell can only follow a previously sent CREATE on the same circuit.

invariants.name: I5_EXTEND_DURING_BUILD
invariants.spec: §5.2: EXTEND/EXTENDED only during multi-hop circuit construction (CIRCUIT_BUILDING).

invariants.name: I6_DATA_AFTER_READY
invariants.spec: §6.1: RELAY_DATA cells require an established circuit (CIRCUIT_READY or TRANSMITTING).

invariants.name: I7_DESTROY_ON_LIVE_CIRC
invariants.spec: §5.4: DESTROY tears down an existing circuit (CIRCUIT_READY or TRANSMITTING).

invariants.name: I8_CLOSED_AFTER_TEARDOWN
invariants.spec: §5.4: CIRCUIT_CLOSED notification only after CLOSING or ERROR.

invariants.name: I9_TIMEOUT_NOT_TERMINAL
invariants.spec: tor implementation: timers do not fire on already-terminal circuits (CLOSED).

oracleIndependent.note: İki oracle da spec-türevli (biri δ tablosu, diğeri narrative invariants). Gerçek Tor binary'den çıkarma DEĞİLDİR; o Shadow gerektirir.
